disconnect_vault_confirm: Do you want to disconnect the Vault "{{name}}"?
local_storage_desc: Notes are saved on the device only.
cloud_storage_desc: You can connect an external folder (like iCloud Drive) to save notes directly there and sync with your computer.
notes_saved_in_folder_hint: 💡 Notes are saved and updated directly in the selected folder.
app_mission: Your notes, where you want them.
select_domain_before_save: Please select a domain before saving
write_note_instruction: Write a note below and press send
delete_forever_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this note forever? This action cannot be undone.
empty_archive_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all archived notes forever? This action cannot be undone.
delete_completed_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all checked items?
